title: Thunder in the Night
writer: Ladislas Fodor, Frances Hyland, Eugene Solow
actors: Edmund Lowe, Karen Morley, Paul Cavanagh
plot: On a windy evening in Budapest, police Captain Karl Torok meets with his superior, the prefect of police, who has just lost the position of president of the cabinet to Torok's friend since childhood, Count Peter Alvinczy. As thund...
